name: klorf_coding
description: Invented coding region from the (fictional) test_fictive genome. The fictive organism uses an 'alien' codon-usage profile that strongly prefers CGG (Arg), GGC (Gly), and TAT (Tyr) — chosen to be obviously distinct from any real organism so the orf_density extractor must consult the supplied codon table rather than its default. Used as a coding exemplar for the EXTENDING.md walkthrough.
sources: synthetic, no biological basis — see EXTENDING.md example.
